title: Elytra Back Slot
description: Move the Elytra to the cape slot of Accessories or Trinkets — fly with full wing animation while wearing a chestplate.
body:
# ElytraBackSlot

**Stop choosing between a chestplate and your wings.** This mod lets you wear the vanilla Elytra in the **cape slot** of [Accessories](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/accessories) or [Trinkets](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/trinkets), so you can fly _and_ keep a real chestplate equipped at the same time.

***

## ✨ Features

*   **Elytra in the cape slot** — equip your wings as an accessory, leaving the chestplate slot free for armor.
*   **Both slots work in parallel** — wear a Netherite Chestplate AND a cape-slot Elytra at the same time. The chestplate gives you defense, the Elytra gives you flight.
*   **Full vanilla flight behavior** — flight works exactly like with a chestplate-Elytra: double-tap space to glide, fireworks for boost, durability ticks down normally as you fly.
*   **Vanilla wing rendering** — the actual Elytra wing model and animation render on your back when flying, not a flat cape texture.
*   **Automatic framework detection** — runtime auto-detection of whichever accessory framework is installed; just drop the mod in and it works.
*   **No config required** — zero setup, zero commands.

***

## 🎮 How it works

1.  Install the mod alongside **Accessories** OR **Trinkets** (or both).
2.  Open the accessory UI:
    *   **Accessories**: press `H` to open the dedicated accessories screen.
    *   **Trinkets**: open your inventory — the cape slot appears in the sidebar.
3.  Drag your Elytra into the **cape slot**.
4.  Jump and press space mid-air — the wings unfold, you glide, durability decreases as expected.
5.  Equip any chestplate you like in the regular armor slot — full armor stats stay active.

***

## 🔧 Compatibility

*   ✅ **Accessories** (Wisp Forest) — uses the built-in `cape` slot, suppresses the default cape rendering so only the vanilla wings show during flight.
*   ✅ **Trinkets** (emilyploszaj) — adds the `chest/cape` slot to the player and registers the Elytra as a valid item.
*   ⚠️ **Curios (Fabric)** — not natively supported; the Fabric port of Curios is largely unmaintained. If you need it, use [accessories-compat-layer](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/accessories-compat-layer) which routes Curios calls through Accessories (your mileage may vary depending on version compatibility).

***

 

## ❓ FAQ

**Q: Do I lose flight if I take damage and lose all my Elytra durability?** A: Same as vanilla — when the Elytra hits zero usable durability, you stop gliding. The broken Elytra stays in the cape slot until you replace it.

**Q: Can I wear an Elytra in BOTH the chestplate slot and the cape slot?** A: Yes, but the vanilla chestplate-Elytra takes priority. The cape-slot one is the fallback when the chest slot has no Elytra (or has a regular chestplate instead).

**Q: Does this work on multiplayer servers?** A: Yes, but the mod must be installed on **both server and client**. Server validates the flight, client renders the wings.

**Q: Will it crash if I have neither Accessories nor Trinkets installed?** A: No, it just does nothing in that case — no crash, no errors.

***
